source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/07. 라벨 수정_250110/12. Usability 문서/A-UFER-BLU Usability Formative Evaluation Report_241231.docx

document.title: 사용적합성 형성 평가 보고서 / Usability Formative Evaluation Report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Formative usability evaluation report for H&abyz Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models B1417MCW, B1717MCW, FB1417MCW, and FB1717MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents a survey-based formative usability assessment intended to screen user interface design flaws that could result in hazardous use errors.
keyPoints: Formative evaluation was conducted through a survey on product usability using a given scenario.
Participants were provided with a user manual and training program before the survey.
The survey was conducted with 5 participants qualified for the intended user profile.
The questionnaire score criterion was 3 points or higher.
All test results were judged appropriate, and product usability was confirmed as safe and effective.

concepts.name: Formative usability evaluation
concepts.evidence: This document is intended to perform formative assessments based on a variety of factors including the complexity of the medical device, the potential for hazardous use errors, development schedule, and budget.

concepts.name: Hazardous use errors
concepts.evidence: screen out user interface design flaws that could potentially result in hazardous use errors.

concepts.name: Survey-based usability assessment
concepts.evidence: Formative evaluation of the product is conducted through a survey on product usability.

concepts.name: User profile qualification
concepts.evidence: The participants must be qualified for the user profile, and the survey is conducted with 5 participants.

concepts.name: Usability re-evaluation triggers
concepts.evidence: The usability evaluation must be re-evaluated in the following cases: Changes in the design of the product; When there are customer requirements related to the usability of the product.
